## Confidence Tier

- [ ] 100% — Direct extraction, verified
- [ ] 75% — Cross-referenced 2 sources
- [ ] 50% — Single source, unverified
- [ ] 25% — Reconstructed/inferred
- [ ] 0% — Unknown / needs investigation
